qualified_leads.signal_evidence: Veritas Legal Group completed acquisition of Sao Paulo-based Advocacia Santos, creating a cross-border legal practice spanning US, UK, and Brazil. Integration expected to complete by June 2026.
qualified_leads.qualification_reason: Legal firm M&A across English/Portuguese markets generates massive volume of precisely formatted legal documents. Contracts, filings, and client agreements all require exact formatting preservation across languages.
qualified_leads.translation_use_case: Legal contracts, client agreements, compliance filings, and internal policies crossing English-Portuguese language boundary. Complex legal PDFs with headers, clauses, signature blocks, and appendices.
qualified_leads.contact_search_path: Found via search_linkedin_person with company_name='Veritas Legal' + title='legal operations'. Verified via get_linkedin_person_data -- confirmed current Director of Legal Operations role since 2024.
qualified_leads.urgency_reasoning: Integration deadline June 2026 -- legal documents being translated NOW for merger completion. High composite score (729).

qualified_leads.signal_evidence: NovaTech Manufacturing disclosed in SEC filing that EU MDR compliance for their medical device product line will require documentation in 11 EU languages. Compliance deadline: September 2026.
qualified_leads.qualification_reason: Medical device manufacturer with hard MDR compliance deadline requiring IFUs, safety data sheets, and technical files in 11 languages. These are highly formatted documents with diagrams, tables, and regulatory-mandated layouts.
qualified_leads.translation_use_case: Instructions for use (IFUs), safety data sheets, technical documentation files, and product labeling -- all complex formatted PDFs requiring precise layout preservation across 11 EU languages for MDR compliance.
qualified_leads.contact_search_path: Found via search_linkedin_person with company_name='NovaTech' + title='regulatory'. Verified via get_linkedin_person_data -- confirmed current VP Regulatory Affairs.
qualified_leads.urgency_reasoning: Hard MDR compliance deadline September 2026. 11 languages of complex technical documentation. Highest composite score in batch (900).

qualified_leads.signal_evidence: Meridian Health Systems announced opening of new European headquarters in Frankfurt, Germany, to support expansion into EU markets. The company plans to offer its patient management platform in 8 European languages by Q3 2026.
qualified_leads.qualification_reason: Healthcare company expanding into EU with patient management platform in 8 languages. Patient-facing documentation and regulatory submissions require precise multilingual formatting.
qualified_leads.translation_use_case: Patient information materials, regulatory submissions for EU markets, product documentation, and marketing materials for 8 European language markets.
qualified_leads.contact_search_path: Found via search_linkedin_person with company_name='Meridian Health' + title='european operations'. Verified via get_linkedin_person_data -- confirmed current Head of European Operations based in Frankfurt.
qualified_leads.urgency_reasoning: Q3 2026 target for 8-language rollout. Still in planning phase but actively setting up EU operations.

disqualified.disqualification_reason: 8 employees, mobile app company. Translation need is UI strings and app store descriptions -- simple text content, not complex formatted documents. Below Bluente's ICP size threshold.
